testcase.name: test_complete_returns_200_with_all_side_effects

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'Strong fundamentals,' in ((None or '')) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe9e644be7c0>('feedback') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe9e644be7c0> = {'_test_marker': 'iter43', 'booked_at': '2026-06-30T13:46:22.655323Z', 'both_joined': False, 'candidate_feedback': 'Strong fundamentals, clear communication, work on system-design depth.', ...}.get

testcase.failure: test_iter43_feedback_email.py:165: in test_complete_returns_200_with_all_side_effects assert VALID_FEEDBACK[:20] in (row.get("feedback") or "") E AssertionError: assert 'Strong fundamentals,' in ((None or '')) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe9e644be7c0>('feedback') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfe9e644be7c0> = {'_test_marker': 'iter43', 'booked_at': '2026-06-30T13:46:22.655323Z', 'both_joined': False, 'candidate_feedback': 'Strong fundamentals, clear communication, work on system-design depth.', ...}.get
